metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for skillwiki — project-aware Karpathy-style knowledge base for Claude Code.

plugins.name: skillwiki
plugins.description: 18 prompt-only skills (wiki-*, proj-*, using-skillwiki) backed by the deterministic skillwiki CLI.

plugins.name: vault-sync
plugins.description: 6 skills (vault-sync-install, vault-sync-status, vault-sync-uninstall, vault-presync, vault-snapshot, vault-fuse-freshness) for cross-platform vault sync: rclone push, fetch-notify, presync, snapshot, and Linux FUSE freshness refresh.
